name: Back Squat
description: Compound lower-body movement. Bar rests on upper traps. Descend until hips below parallel.

name: Goblet Squat
description: Hold a dumbbell at chest height. Squat deep, elbows tracking inside knees.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
description: Rear foot elevated on bench. Deep lunge. Develops unilateral leg strength and balance.

name: Conventional Deadlift
description: Hip-hinge pattern. Drive floor away, keep bar close to body, lock out hips at top.

name: Romanian Deadlift
description: Soft knee bend, hinge at hips, feel hamstring stretch at bottom. Great for posterior chain.

name: Trap Bar Deadlift
description: More quad-friendly than conventional. Good starting deadlift variation.

name: Barbell Hip Thrust
description: Shoulders on bench, bar across hips. Drive hips to full extension. Peak glute activation.

name: Bench Press
description: Horizontal push. Bar to nipple line, slight arch, elbows 45-75° from torso.

name: Dumbbell Incline Press
description: 30-45° incline. Targets upper chest. Good unilateral balance.

name: Push-Up
description: Ground-based horizontal push. Full ROM, elbows at 45°. Scales via elevation.

name: Barbell Row
description: Horizontal pull. Hinge forward, bar to lower chest, squeeze shoulder blades.

name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Row
description: Knee on bench. Pull dumbbell to hip, elbow close to body.

name: Cable Row
description: Seated row to abdomen. Maintain upright torso, full stretch at extension.

name: Pull-Up
description: Full hang, pull until chin over bar. Use bands for assistance if needed.

name: Lat Pulldown
description: Wide grip, pull bar to upper chest. Retract shoulder blades.

name: Overhead Press
description: Standing or seated. Press bar overhead to full lockout. Core braced throughout.

name: Lateral Raise
description: Slight forward lean, arms rise to shoulder height. Slow controlled eccentric.

name: Plank
description: Forearms on floor, body rigid. Squeeze glutes and brace abs. Hold for time.

name: Dead Bug
description: Lower back pressed to floor. Opposite arm/leg extends simultaneously.

name: Ab Wheel Rollout
description: Kneel, roll wheel forward maintaining a rigid torso. Anti-extension core exercise.

name: Interval Sprints
description: 20-30s all-out effort, 90s recovery. 6-10 rounds. Excellent fat loss and conditioning.

name: Steady-State Run
description: Zone 2 aerobic base building. Conversational pace, 30-60 minutes.

name: Assault Bike Intervals
description: Max effort 10-20s, full rest 40-50s. 8-10 rounds. Brutal full-body conditioning.

name: Rowing Machine
description: Low-impact full-body cardio. Drive with legs first, then lean back, then arms.

name: Jump Rope
description: Double-unders for advanced. Great judo warm-up. 3-5 rounds of 2 minutes.

name: Hip 90/90 Stretch
description: Sit with both legs at 90° angles. Hold 60s each side. Critical for judo hip mobility.

name: Thoracic Rotation
description: Side-lying, top knee bent, rotate upper torso. Open chest to ceiling.

name: Ankle Mobility Drill
description: Knee-to-wall drill. Drive knee over toes without heel lifting. 10 reps each.

name: World's Greatest Stretch
description: Lunge forward, drop elbow to instep, rotate arm to ceiling. 5 reps per side.

name: Couch Stretch
description: Rear knee on floor, shin up wall. Upright torso. 2 min each side. Fixes desk posture.

name: Uchi-Komi (Repetition Entry)
description: Repeated throw entries without completion. Builds explosive hip insertion and muscle memory. 10 reps per throw per side.

name: Grip Strength Dead Hang
description: Hang from bar with full grip. Builds the forearm endurance critical for kumi-kata.

name: Towel Pull-Up
description: Drape towels over bar, grip ends. Pull-ups develop judo-specific grip and pulling strength.

name: Explosive Hip Extension (Band)
description: Band around hips, anchored behind. Drive hips forward explosively. Mimics harai-goshi/o-goshi hip action.

name: Seoi-Nage Shoulder Drill
description: Simulate shoulder entry with resistance band. Builds seoi-nage-specific pulling mechanics.

name: Sled Push
description: Low body position drive. Builds legs-in-for-throw strength and cardiovascular output.

name: Kettlebell Swing
description: Hip hinge power. Develops explosive posterior chain strength for throw execution.

name: Medicine Ball Rotational Throw
description: Rotate and throw med ball against wall. Develops rotational power for ippon-seoi-nage and uchi-mata.

name: Grip Pinching (Plate Pinch)
description: Pinch two plates together and hold. Develops pinching grip strength for lapel grips.

name: Bridging (Ukemi Drill)
description: Lie on back, bridge on top of head. Builds neck strength critical for falling safely and groundwork.

name: Randori Simulation (Shadow Judo)
description: 3-minute rounds of shadow gripping, stance switching, entry drilling. Builds judo-specific endurance.

name: Foam Rolling (Thoracic)
description: Roll thoracic spine for 60s. Pause on tight spots. Restores extension lost from gripping posture.

name: Contrast Shower
description: Alternate 3min hot / 1min cold, 3-4 cycles. Reduces DOMS and improves circulation.

name: Legs Up the Wall
description: Lie on back, legs vertical against wall. 5-10 minutes. Reduces leg fatigue post-training.

name: Box Breathing
description: 4s inhale, 4s hold, 4s exhale, 4s hold. 5 minutes. Activates parasympathetic system post-competition.

name: Cold Water Immersion
description: 10-15°C for 10-15 minutes. Most evidence-backed recovery method for reducing DOMS and inflammation.

name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
description: Most effective hamstring eccentric exercise. Lowers risk of hamstring strain significantly.

name: Face Pull
description: Cable to face height, pull to ears with external rotation. Counteracts bench press/judo posture.

name: Pallof Press
description: Press cable straight out from chest. Resist rotation. Anti-rotation core strength for grappling.

name: Single-Leg RDL
description: Balance on one leg, hinge forward. Builds hip stability and unilateral hamstring strength.

name: Trap-3 Raise
description: Lie prone on incline bench, raise dumbbells in Y position. Crucial rotator cuff health for grappling.

name: Z-Press
description: Seated on floor, legs straight. Overhead press. Eliminates leg drive, demands core stability.

name: Arm Drag Entry (Band)
description: Simulate arm drag entry against band resistance. Develops single-leg attack setups.

name: Burpee Broad Jump
description: Burpee followed by maximum broad jump. Builds explosive power and cardiovascular conditioning simultaneously.

name: Seated Butterfly Stretch
description: Soles of feet together, lean forward. Stretch adductors for guard work and uchi-mata.

name: Cat-Cow
description: Alternating spinal flexion/extension. Warms up spine pre-training, decompresses post-training.

name: Epsom Salt Bath
description: 400g Epsom salt in warm bath for 20 minutes. Magnesium absorption may reduce muscle soreness.

name: Cable Woodchop
description: Diagonal pull from high to low (and reverse). Rotational core power for throwing.
